pageContext.name: Be@rbrick mintdesigns 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy present the Be@rbrick mintdesigns 400% Collectible Figure!  Standing at approximately 11.02' tall, this Be@rbrick figure features a print of mintdesigns' cool, hip, and famous clothing line.  Don't miss your chance to add this Be@rbrick to your collection today!
